methods.name: distributions.Generaldistribution.Distribution.__init__
documentation:
Generic distribution class for calculating and
visualizing a probability distribution.

Attributes:
    mean (float) representing the mean value of the distribution
    stdev (float) representing the standard deviation of the distribution
    data_list (list of floats) a list of floats extracted from the data file

methods.name: distributions.Generaldistribution.Distribution.read_data_file
documentation:
Function to read in data from a txt file. The txt file should have
one number (float) per line. The numbers are stored in the data attribute.

Args:
    file_name (string): name of a file to read from

Returns:
    None

classes.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.calculate_mean
documentation:
Function to calculate the mean from p and n

Args:
    None

Returns:
    float: mean of the data set

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.calculate_stdev
documentation:
Function to calculate the standard deviation from p and n.

Args:
    None

Returns:
    float: standard deviation of the data set

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.replace_stats_with_data
documentation:
Function to calculate p and n from the data set

Args:
    None

Returns:
    float: the p value
    float: the n value

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.plot_bar
documentation:
Function to output a histogram of the instance variable data using
matplotlib pyplot library.

Args:
    None

Returns:
    None

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.pdf
documentation:
Probability density function calculator for the gaussian distribution.

Args:
    x (float): point for calculating the probability density function


Returns:
    float: probability density function output

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.plot_bar_pdf
documentation:
Function to plot the pdf of the binomial distribution

Args:
    None

Returns:
    list: x values for the pdf plot
    list: y values for the pdf plot

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.__add__
documentation:
Function to add together two Binomial distributions with equal p

Args:
    other (Binomial): Binomial instance

Returns:
    Binomial: Binomial distribution

methods.name: distributions.BinomialDistribution.Binomial.__repr__
documentation:
Function to output the characteristics of the Binomial instance

Args:
    None

Returns:
    string: characteristics of the Gaussian

Binomial distribution class for calculating and
visualizing a Binomial distribution.

Attributes:
    mean (float) representing the mean value of the distribution
    stdev (float) representing the standard deviation of the distribution
    data_list (list of floats) a list of floats to be extracted from the data file
    p (float) representing the probability of an event occurring
    n (int) number of trials

classes.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.calculate_mean
documentation:
Function to calculate the mean of the data set.

Args:
    None

Returns:
    float: mean of the data set

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.calculate_stdev
documentation:
Function to calculate the standard deviation of the data set.

Args:
    sample (bool): whether the data represents a sample or population

Returns:
    float: standard deviation of the data set

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.plot_histogram
documentation:
Function to output a histogram of the instance variable data using
matplotlib pyplot library.

Args:
    None

Returns:
    None

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.pdf
documentation:
Probability density function calculator for the gaussian distribution.

Args:
    x (float): point for calculating the probability density function


Returns:
    float: probability density function output

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.plot_histogram_pdf
documentation:
Function to plot the normalized histogram of the data and a plot of the
probability density function along the same range

Args:
    n_spaces (int): number of data points

Returns:
    list: x values for the pdf plot
    list: y values for the pdf plot

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.__add__
documentation:
Function to add together two Gaussian distributions

Args:
    other (Gaussian): Gaussian instance

Returns:
    Gaussian: Gaussian distribution

methods.name: distributions.GaussianDistribution.Gaussian.__repr__
documentation:
Function to output the characteristics of the Gaussian instance

Args:
    None

Returns:
    string: characteristics of the Gaussian

Gaussian distribution class for calculating and
visualizing a Gaussian distribution.

Attributes:
    mean (float) representing the mean value of the distribution
    stdev (float) representing the standard deviation of the distribution
    data_list (list of floats) a list of floats extracted from the data file
